layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing. p-6 to p-12 for sections. Mobile-first responsive grids.
layout_and_spacing.hero: Asymmetrical split or overlapping bento layout. Use large display typography. Avoid standard centered text on full background.
layout_and_spacing.menu_grid: Bento style for categories or standard grids. grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for a friendly, soft, organic feel. Avoid sharp brutalist edges.
layout_and_spacing.mobile_nav: Sticky bottom cart drawer or floating action button for easy access on mobile.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or large rounded (rounded-xl). Hover state: slightly darker hue, -translate-y-1. Primary CTA uses #FF9F1C with dark text (#1E1E1E).
components.cards: Subtle warm shadows (shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(27,67,50,0.04)]). 1px border (#EAE6DF). Solid surfaces, no glassmorphism for food items to maintain appetizing contrast.
components.cart_drawer: Shadcn Sheet component. Must show subtotal clearly and explicitly mention '+ ₹5 parcel charge per item'.
components.checkout_form: Shadcn Form. Segmented control (Radio Group style) for Outlet (East Fort / West Fort) is MANDATORY before placing the order.
components.whatsapp_button: Use the dedicated green (#25D366) specifically for the WhatsApp final CTA to build trust and familiarity.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale up images on hover (scale-105 with overflow-hidden on parent). Button lifts.
motion_and_interactions.cart_add: Micro-interaction: Button changes to 'Added' momentarily, or small badge pop/bounce on the cart icon.

images.description: Mango shake splash cocktail - use for hero section background or main feature graphic.
Orange juice splash - use in bento grid or highlights section.
Smoothie/Shake in glass - use for popular items or category headers.
Red falooda dessert glass - use for popular items or menu features.
Modern cafe interior with plants - use for the locations/contact section.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on primary/secondary colors meets 4.5:1 ratio. Primary CTA has dark text on orange background for high legibility.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='checkout-outlet-select').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard React + Tailwind CSS layout using these guidelines.
Use standard Radix/Shadcn UI components but heavily customize spacing, radius (rounded-2xl), and fonts to avoid the 'default saas' look.
Initialize React app with 'Fraunces', 'Outfit', and 'DM Sans' from Google Fonts via link tags in index.html.
Ensure 'East Fort' / 'West Fort' selection is enforced via form validation before the WhatsApp link is generated.
WhatsApp link must be formatted: `https://wa.me/<number>?text=<URL_ENCODED_ORDER_STRING>`. Format the text beautifully with line breaks.
Parcel charge logic: Total = (Sum of item prices) + (Total Quantity * 5).
